hero.title: Intelligent Crypto Investment,
hero.subtitle: Our team of veteran quantitative traders and portfolio strategists actively manage your crypto allocation — so you capture the upside without navigating the complexity.

features.title: The infrastructure of a hedge fund, built for you
features.securityDesc: Multi-layer encryption, cold storage protocols, and real-time threat monitoring protect every dollar you invest.
features.expertsDesc: Seasoned professionals with decades of combined experience actively manage your portfolio around the clock.
features.transparentDesc: Real-time dashboards, weekly reports, and direct manager access keep you informed at every step.
features.multicurrencyDesc: Invest and withdraw in BTC, ETH, USDC, USDT, or fiat. Your portfolio stays in a unified USD balance.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to growing wealth
howItWorks.step1Desc: Register in minutes. Verify your email and complete a brief profile to unlock your investment dashboard.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Deposit via crypto (BTC, ETH, USDC, USDT) or fiat (Stripe, Paystack, PayPal). All funds convert to a unified USD balance.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your dedicated manager activates your chosen package. Watch your portfolio grow through our live performance dashboard.

packages.title: Choose your growth trajectory
packages.subtitle: Three tiers designed for different capital levels and risk appetites. All packages include a dedicated account manager.
packages.switchGold: This amount qualifies for our Gold package. Switch?
packages.switchPlatinum: This amount qualifies for our Platinum package. Switch?
packages.belowMin: Amount is below the minimum for this package.

auth.verifyEmailDesc: We sent a verification link to your email address. Click it to activate your account.
auth.resetDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.twoFADesc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

footer.tagline: Institutional crypto investment, accessible to everyone.
footer.disclaimer: ASTRO META-TRADE is a digital asset investment platform. Cryptocurrency investments carry significant risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Please read our Risk Disclosure before investing.
